claim_text: CRS reports an estimated $298B in constant-2024-dollar U.S. aid obligations to Israel from 1946 through 2024.
evidence_boundary: Proves CRS's stated cumulative estimate; does not prove causation against any specific domestic U.S. program.
next_check: Capture report version/date after each CRS update.
notes: Use constant-dollar and current-dollar figures in separate rows.

claim_text: OCHA reported 72,289 Palestinian fatalities in Gaza as of 1 April 2026, attributed to MoH Gaza.
evidence_boundary: Proves the reported figure and attribution chain; does not independently verify every death record.
next_check: Check next OCHA snapshot before publication.

claim_text: UNICEF reported 21,289 children killed in Gaza through 3 February 2026.
evidence_boundary: Proves UNICEF's reported figure and date range; does not make the figure a court finding.
next_check: Check UNICEF situation update archive for superseding release.
notes: Pair with date range and source boundary.

claim_text: CPJ was investigating at least 261 journalists and media workers killed since the Israel-Gaza war began.
source_label: Committee to Protect Journalists casualty tracker
evidence_boundary: Proves CPJ's tracker count and investigation status; does not prove every case has the same evidentiary posture.
next_check: Check CPJ tracker timestamp before reuse.
notes: Use 'among those killed' or CPJ's framing.

claim_text: The ICJ issued provisional measures in South Africa v. Israel; the merits question remained unresolved at that stage.
evidence_boundary: Proves procedural posture and orders; does not equal a final merits ruling.
next_check: Extract exact order language into legal-status brief.
notes: Never collapse provisional measures into final judgment.
